uploads_base_path.description: Filesystem path where uploaded images are stored

uploads_base_url.description: Public URL prefix for serving uploaded images

max_file_size_bytes.description: Maximum allowed upload file size in bytes (default: 10 MB)

allowed_mime_types.description: Comma-separated list of allowed image MIME types

default_robots.description: Default robots meta value applied to new pages

default_language.description: Default language code applied to new pages

posts_per_page.description: Default page size for public post listings

scheduled_publish_interval_seconds.description: How often the scheduled-publish tick runs (seconds)

public_base_url.description: Absolute site root for RSS feed channel + fallback item permalinks

rss_item_limit.description: Maximum number of items in an RSS feed

seo_prerender_enabled.description: Switch on prerendered SEO generation (SPA only if switched off)

prerender_service_url.description: Base URL of an external full-page renderer; when set, the COMPLETE page HTML (layout + content) is saved. Empty = content-only document (default).

minify_prerender_output.description: Minify emitted prerender HTML (inline CSS/JS + inter-tag whitespace); JSON-LD and the __POST__ payload are byte-preserved. Takes effect on the next prerender/regenerate.

seo_serve_to_humans.description: Operator intent to serve the prerender to human visitors on public routes (not only crawlers). Mapped to the fe-user nginx SEO_DEFAULT_PREFIX at deploy time; requires an fe-user restart to take effect.

seo_serve_exclude_prefixes.description: Comma-separated URL prefixes always served the SPA shell (never the anonymous prerender), even when serve-to-humans is on.

seo_dynamic_render_enabled.description: Master switch for on-demand full-page rendering (render-on-miss + cache) served to bots via the internal /_seo-render route. Requires prerender_service_url.

seo_render_cache_ttl_seconds.description: Time-to-live (seconds) for a cached on-demand render before it is re-rendered.

seo_render_internal_token.description: Shared secret nginx injects as X-VBWD-Render-Token when routing a bot to the internal render route. Empty = the route is disabled (404).

indexnow_enabled.description: Ping IndexNow (Bing/Yandex/Seznam) with the canonical URL whenever a CMS post is published/updated, for instant recrawl. Requires public_base_url + indexnow_key.

indexnow_key.description: IndexNow verification key (8-128 chars of [A-Za-z0-9-]). Served at the site root as /<key>.txt. Empty = feature disabled even when the toggle is on.

indexnow_endpoint.description: IndexNow submission endpoint. The default fans out to all participating search engines.
